program_name: Grid-Responsive Incentive Design – Market Access Program (GRID-MAP)
administrator_or_implementer: Mendota Group, LLC (under contract with SCE)
program_type: Market Access Program (MAP) – Pay-for-performance using metered savings (NMEC)
core_idea: Aggregator-led portfolios of DER/EE projects; incentives paid on measured savings at time-of-use values (avoided costs).
measurement_approach: NMEC per CPUC NMEC Rulebook; pre/post meter comparisons adjusted for weather, activity, etc.
payment_basis: Avoided-cost-weighted energy savings; incentive rates vary annually with avoided cost updates.
customer_segments: SCE Commercial (e.g., Lodging, Hospitals, Home Centers, Pharmacies/Drug Stores, Warehouse Clubs/Superstores) and Residential (Single Family, Multifamily, Mobile/Manufactured Homes).
registration_path: Aggregator Resources page (register as Aggregator) or choose an approved Aggregator from the Aggregator List page
